CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breach
CRITICAL.condition: Pipeline has not run in more than 24 hours
CRITICAL.message: The data pipeline has not run in more than 24 hours, leading to stale data.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the pipeline failure immediately.

CRITICAL.name: quality_threshold_violation
CRITICAL.message: Data quality has fallen below the 99.9% threshold, risking erroneous financial reports.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Identify and rectify the data quality issues as a priority.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the 17-25 range
CRITICAL.message: The row count is outside the expected range of 17-25, affecting data completeness.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Check for data processing errors or external factors affecting row count.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.condition: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit
WARNING.message: Pipeline runtime is nearing the 120-minute limit, which may delay the dashboard update.
WARNING.recommended_action: Monitor the pipeline closely and optimize processing if necessary.

WARNING.name: quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.condition: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%
WARNING.message: Data quality is slightly below the 99.9% threshold, which could lead to minor inaccuracies.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the cause and take steps to improve data quality.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_spike
WARNING.condition: One merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: A merchant's failure rate has spiked above 30%, indicating potential issues.
WARNING.recommended_action: Assess the merchant's data processing and address any failures promptly.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: A new payment method is detected in the data
INFO.message: A new payment method has been detected in the data, which may require updates to processing logic.
INFO.recommended_action: Review and update the pipeline to accommodate the new payment method.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near the minimum or maximum bounds
INFO.message: The daily row count is near the minimum or maximum bounds, but still within acceptable limits.
INFO.recommended_action: Monitor the row count for any trends that may require attention.
